messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Vault

### Vault

```hcl
resource "oci_kms_vault" "vault" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-vault"
  vault_type    = "VIRTUAL_PRIVATE"

  management_endpoint = oci_kms_vault.vault.management_endpoint
  crypto_endpoint   = oci_kms_vault.vault.crypto_endpoint
}
```

### Key

```hcl
resource "oci_kms_key" "key" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-key"
  key_id       = oci_kms_vault.vault.id

  key_shape {
    algorithm = "AES"
    length   = 256
  }

  protection_mode = "SOFTWARE"
}
```

### Secret

```hcl
resource "oci_vault_secret" "secret" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vault_id     = oci_kms_vault.vault.id
  secret_name  = "my-secret"

  secret_content {
    content = base64encode("my-secret-value")
  }

  secret_type = "OPAQUE"
}
```

### Use Cases

- Encrypt volumes
- Store secrets
- Sign data
